commit_message:
Fix tag trace replay, tag data set to low when not sending Fix tag trace replay, tag data set to low when not sending tag_data_o should set to 1'b0 when not sending (when valid_o == 0).

This module was working before, because the previous version PISO kept data_o=last_bit_sent (which was 1'b0) when valid_o=0. The new version PISO keeps data_o=first_bit_sent (which is 1'b1), exposing the issue.
